Supporting Every Lift In Life
settings.copy: Whether you're chasing PRs, deadlines, wild trails, or tiny humans—Liquid Hydrogen fuels the lifts that matter. Hydration with purpose, for every version of you.

settings.title: Feel the  H₂ Lift
settings.copy:
1. Tear & Pour: Add one packet to 16 oz of water
  2. Let It Dissolve: Allow it to dissolve naturally—no stirring (stirring releases the H₂ faster)
  3. Drink Within 20 Minutes: Hydrogen molecules are escape artists—consume quickly for full benefits

settings.title: H₂ + Electrolytes
settings.copy: Hydrocharge your performance with our unique blend of molecular hydrogen and vital electrolytes, packed into a sleek, go-anywhere packet. Discover how this dynamic formula unlocks peak athletic potential by optimizing, revitalizing, energizing, and defending your body like never before.

settings.title: Cellular Optimization
settings.copy:
Molecular hydrogen is like your cellular DJ—adjusting the levels to get everything in perfect harmony. As pioneering researcher Dr. Shigeo Ohta discovered, H₂ helps bring your cells back to their optimal state by selectively neutralizing only harmful free radicals while preserving beneficial ones.

Unlike other antioxidants that indiscriminately eliminate all free radicals, H₂ is smart enough to target only the troublemakers—maintaining your body's delicate balance.

settings.title: More Than Just Electrolytes
settings.copy:
Rehydrate faster and more efficiently with our precision H₂ + electrolyte blend.

Step into First Class Hydration: Our formula delivers molecular hydrogen while replenishing vital electrolytes to support hydration at the cellular level.

The smallest molecule in the universe packs a surprising punch for recovery and performance.

settings.title: Natural Energy & Speeds Recovery
settings.copy:
Experience smoother, more sustained energy without the crash or jitters.

Molecular hydrogen helps combat fatigue and speeds recovery by optimizing cellular function and ATP production—your body's energy currency.

Instead of borrowing energy from tomorrow, you're maximizing what you have today.

settings.title: Protect Your Cells
settings.copy:
Molecular hydrogen is nature's original antioxidant, perfected over billions of years.

As Tyler LeBaron of the Molecular Hydrogen Institute explains, H₂ works differently than traditional antioxidants by selectively targeting harmful hydroxyl radicals, activating your body's own antioxidant defenses through the Nrf2 pathway, and supporting healthy inflammatory responses.

Think of it as upgrading your body's entire security system rather than just adding a guard.

settings.title: How To Use
settings.copy:
To maximize your molecular hydrogen lift:

  1. Tear & Pour: Add one packet to 16 oz of water
  2. Let It Dissolve: Allow it to dissolve naturally—no stirring (stirring releases the H₂ faster)
  3. Drink Within 20 Minutes: Hydrogen molecules are escape artists—consume quickly for full benefits

Ideal Times to Feel The Lift:

  • 30 minutes before workouts to prime cells for performance
  • First thing in the morning to start your day optimized
  • After intense activity to support recovery

settings.title: What's In The Mix
settings.copy:
We're all about transparency, so here's the full scoop on our ingredients:

  • Citric Acid
  • Natural Lemon Flavor (with a splash of other natural flavors)
  • Sodium Chloride
  • Potassium Phosphate
  • Sodium Citrate
  • Magnesium
  • Natural Stevia Extract
  • Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C)
  • A pinch of Turmeric Extract for that sunny, vibrant color

A bright, tangy lemon flavor that's like sunshine in a glass—crisp, refreshing, and leaves you smiling, not wincing.

settings.title: Why is molecular hydrogen important?
settings.copy:
As the smallest molecule in the universe, molecular hydrogen (H₂) can reach areas other supplements can't—penetrating cell membranes, mitochondria, and even crossing the blood-brain barrier.

H₂ is nature's selective antioxidant: it neutralizes harmful free radicals while preserving beneficial ones your body needs for signaling. This unique selectivity helps bring your cells back to their optimal state without disrupting normal cellular function.

When cells are at their peak performance, you see and feel the impact like reduced inflammation and faster recovery time.

settings.title: How much should I drink per day?
settings.copy:
For best results, most people feel the lift with 1–2 packets a day. Athletes often use one 30 minutes pre-workout to power up, and another post-sweat to recharge.

The beauty of molecular hydrogen? No known upper limit. Your body takes what it needs and naturally breathes out the rest. That’s why we crafted each packet with a high-performance 5mg dose—so you're always covered, whether you're lifting weights or lifting toddlers.

settings.title: When should I drink it for best results?
settings.copy:
• Pre-workout (30 minutes before): H₂ primes your cells for performance and electrolytes fuel your body
  • Morning: Start your day with cellular optimization and the nutrients you need
  • Post-workout: Support recovery when your body needs it most

The key is drinking it within 20 minutes of making it to maximize your hydrogen dose before it dissipates.

settings.title: How does it compare to other electrolyte drinks?
settings.copy:
Most electrolyte drinks just replace what you lose through sweat. Liquid Hydrogen goes further:

  1. Beyond Hydration: We've added molecular hydrogen that works at the cellular level to optimize how your body uses those electrolytes
  2. Selective Antioxidant Action: H₂ is a precision tool that targets only harmful free radicals
  3. Nothing Artificial: Unlike many sports drinks, we use zero artificial colors, flavors, or sweeteners

It's like comparing basic transportation to a premium experience—both get you there, but one elevates the journey.

settings.title: How does it work (Won't the gas just escape)?
settings.copy:
You're right—molecular hydrogen is the smallest molecule in the universe and naturally wants to escape. That's why we've engineered our powder to dissolve quickly without stirring.

Each packet creates a supersaturated hydrogen solution when it hits water, reaching concentrations of 5mg per dose. While the hydrogen will gradually escape over time (about 50% within 60-90 minutes), drinking it within 20 minutes ensures you get the full effects.

Pro tips from the Lab:

  • One-Shot Wonder: Studies by Dr. Kajiyama suggest consuming a full dose (at least 1mg) all at once is more effective than sipping throughout the day.
  • Consistency is Key: Research shows daily consumption provides cumulative benefits beyond acute effects.
